description: Response-only embedding baseline aligned to the Qwen experiment track. Uses the same frozen all-mpnet-base-v2 encoder and logistic-regression training loop as setup104, but feeds only response_emb to the classifier. The Qwen-backed files are kept only to align rows with setup104-qwen for a clean ablation of how much the neutral + delta blocks add beyond the response alone. Trainer type: response_embedding_classifier.
